summary: Comprehensive testing of BMIA Phase 3 Intelligence Revamp completed successfully. All new signal-related backend APIs working with real market data and LLM integration. Frontend UI properly displays signals, track record, and AI learning insights. Signal generation (15-30 seconds) and evaluation features working as expected. No critical bugs found.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/signals/generate with INFY.NS (HOLD signal at 1329.7 with 52% confidence)
Backend: GET /api/signals/track-record (3 total signals, 0% win rate - expected for open signals)
Frontend: /signals page loads with Signal Dashboard showing 5 active signals
Frontend: /track-record page loads with performance metrics and 'No Closed Signals Yet' message
Frontend: /analyze/INFY.NS page loads with AI Intelligence Engine section visible
Frontend: Generate AI Signal button successfully generates INFY HOLD signal
Frontend: Signal Dashboard shows new INFY signal after generation
Frontend: AI Learning tab shows insights with 'No historical signals yet' message
Frontend: SEBI disclaimers visible on all signal-related pages
Frontend: Evaluate All button functionality working
Frontend: Tab navigation (Active, History, AI Learning) working
Frontend: Provider selection buttons (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) working
Integration: Real-time signal generation with yfinance data (5-15s) + LLM calls (10-20s)
Integration: Signal persistence and retrieval working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed including 6 new signal endpoints)
